scope: Verified first batch focused on aliases, members, shared projects and high-value navigation links.

relation_type_guidance.same_person_alias: Two billed names belong to the same person. Show both sets under one identity hub.
relation_type_guidance.alias_of: The festival project name belongs to a named person.
relation_type_guidance.project_member: The related artist is a member of the billed collaboration.
relation_type_guidance.shared_project: Two separately billed artists also perform together under another project.
relation_type_guidance.shared_member: Two projects overlap through at least one member, but are not the same project.
relation_type_guidance.member_of: The artist also belongs or belonged to another group.
relation_type_guidance.current_member: A current member of a duo or group.
relation_type_guidance.former_member: Historical member only. Do not present as current.
relation_type_guidance.sibling_project: A parallel project by the same core artists.
relation_type_guidance.normalized_project_name: Festival-specific or alternate spelling that should resolve to a canonical project.

relations.note: 8ternal Beings is a collaboration featuring Tristan and Regan. Tristan also performs separately at the festival.
8ternal Beings is a collaboration featuring Tristan and Regan. Regan also performs separately at the festival.
Avalon and Tristan are the two artists behind Killerwatts, while both also have separate Ozora 2026 sets.
Ace Ventura and Astrix perform together as Alpha Portal and also appear separately in the Ozora 2026 timetable.

sources.title: Amsterdam Dance Event - Ace Ventura biography

relations.note: Braincell and Rastaliens are projects operated by Ralph K. Freund. These should be linked as aliases of the same person, not as band members.
Tetrameth and Shadow FX are the two brothers behind Twisted Sibling and both perform separately at Ozora 2026.
Mysticism and Ramizes are two aliases used by Ozzy Cetin. Both aliases have separate festival billing.
The Gong Zen performance is credited to Jens Zygar of Star Sounds Orchestra together with the Ozorian Gong Orchestra.

sources.title: O.Z.O.R.A. Festival - Gong Zen performance credit

relations.note: Aardvarkk is the solo psytrance project of Nigel Shiva Valley.
Altruism is the psytrance production project of Brazilian DJ Thatha.
Avi Nissim is a current member of Astral Projection.
Lior Perlmutter is a current member of Astral Projection.
Astral Projection was originally formed under the name SFX.
Captain Hook is the artist project of Reshef Harari.
Before Captain Hook, Reshef Harari was part of the collaborative project Quantize.
Sheff is another project name previously used by Reshef Harari.
Oforia is the solo project of Ofer Dikovsky.
Ofer Dikovsky was a member of Indoor and later revived the project.
After Indoor, Ofer Dikovsky formed Tandu with Marco Goren.
Deedrah is a solo project of Frédéric 'Dado' Holyszewski.
Dado formed Transwave with Christof Drouillet.
Krome Angels is another group involving Dado.
Max Lanfranconi is part of the current Etnica core.

sources.title: Orb Mag - Etnica history and current members

relations.note: Maurizio Begotti is part of the current Etnica core.

sources.title: Orb Mag - Etnica history and current members

relations.note: Roy Sason performs the historical Shidapu material under the Shidapu name.
Roy Sason is also part of the Israeli progressive act MUTe.
Tsuyoshi Suzuki formed Taiyo with Nick Taylor, which later became Prana.
Solar Fields is the musical alias of Magnus Birgersson.
Gabriel Le Mar lists Saafi Brothers among his established artistic constellations.

sources.title: Gabriel Le Mar official Bandcamp profile

relations.note: Gabriel Le Mar lists Aural Float among his established artistic constellations.

sources.title: Gabriel Le Mar official Bandcamp profile

relations.note: Gabriel Le Mar lists Dublocation among his established artistic constellations.

sources.title: Gabriel Le Mar official Bandcamp profile

relations.note: Mirror System is the downtempo and chillout project of System 7's Steve Hillage and Miquette Giraudy.
Steve Hillage is one of the two artists behind Mirror System.
Miquette Giraudy is one of the two artists behind Mirror System.
Misled Convoy is Mike Hodgson's project.
Mike Hodgson is a member of Pitch Black.
Humanoids is a collaboration between Sandman and Illumination.
Humanoids is a collaboration between Sandman and Illumination.
Trubble is a project by Celli, also known through Earthling, and K.i.M.
Trubble is a project by Celli and K.i.M.
S&A in Dub is the joint project of Synthbiont and Anassimandrus.
S&A in Dub is the joint project of Synthbiont and Anassimandrus.
AUX25 is an alias of Interchill co-founder Andrew Ross Collins.
Phil Hartnoll is one half of Orbital, together with Paul Hartnoll.

sources.title: PRS for Music - Phil Hartnoll, Orbital

relations.note: Kukan Dub Lagan is the chillout project of Itay Berger; the festival billing 'Kukan Dub Ambient' should link to that identity.
Use Kukan Dub Lagan as the canonical project identity and retain Kukan Dub Ambient as the festival-specific billing.
Tor.Ma in Dub is the project of Rafael Hernandez.
The artist behind Anatolian Weapons also makes music as Dream Weapons.
The artist behind Anatolian Weapons also makes music as Fantastikoi Hxoi.
Daniel Rosado is one of the two members of Zen Baboon.
Henrique Palhavã is one of the two members of Zen Baboon.
Marcus Maichel co-created X-Dream.
Jan Müller co-created X-Dream.
The official biography lists Piers Oak-Rhind as the current band member.
Helmut Glavar is a former member and should not be displayed as part of the current live project.
Digital Talk is credited to Julien Fougea and Luc Achintre.
Digital Talk is credited to Julien Fougea and Luc Achintre.
Miles From Mars is the duo of Max Kibble and Shane Renew.

sources.title: Resident Advisor - Miles From Mars biography

relations.note: Miles From Mars is the duo of Max Kibble and Shane Renew.

sources.title: Resident Advisor - Miles From Mars biography

relations.note: Triforce is the musical project of Charlotte Lohmann and Ryan Smith.
Triforce is the musical project of Charlotte Lohmann and Ryan Smith.
Release credits identify Jake Ainley and Ric Featherstone as the producers behind Tongue & Groove.

sources.title: Atto Music - Tongue & Groove release credits

relations.note: Release credits identify Jake Ainley and Ric Featherstone as the producers behind Tongue & Groove.

sources.title: Atto Music - Tongue & Groove release credits

relations.note: Rupert Till releases electronic music as Professor Chill.

sources.title: University of Huddersfield - Rupert Till biography

Fluidum x Peao x Fanni Zahár
billing_decompositions.normalization_note: The lineup spelling 'Peao' appears to refer to PEAQ and should remain reviewable.

billing_decompositions.billing: Hèt Hat Club feat. Freak Fusion

false_positive_warnings.reason: Verified release credits identify Jake Ainley and Ric Featherstone.
GBU is a separate project involving Dado/Deedrah, Serge Souque and Dimitri Nakov. Do not infer GMS from the initials.

false_positive_warnings.incorrect_mapping: S&A in Dub = Solar Fields & AES Dana
false_positive_warnings.reason: The billing refers to Synthbiont & Anassimandrus.

false_positive_warnings.incorrect_mapping: Entheogenic is currently a duo with Helmut Glavar
false_positive_warnings.reason: The official biography lists Piers Oak-Rhind as the current member and Helmut Glavar as former.
